mapper.sql: question_id, bank_id, chapter_name, template_code, version_group_id, version_no, version_remark, source_action, source_question_id, source_version_no, title, question_type, difficulty, status, update_time, answer_text, analysis_text, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted
mapper.select: select count(1) from questions where deleted = false
select count(1) from questions where bank_id = #{bankId} and deleted = false
select from questions where question_id = #{questionId} and deleted = false
select from questions where version_group_id = #{versionGroupId} and deleted = false order by version_no desc, question_id desc

select q.question_id, q.bank_id, q.chapter_name, q.template_code, q.version_group_id, q.version_no, q.version_remark, q.source_action, q.source_question_id, q.source_version_no, q.title, q.question_type, q.difficulty, q.status, q.update_time, q.answer_text, q.analysis_text, q.created_at, q.updated_at, q.created_by, q.updated_by, q.deleted from questions q inner join ( select version_group_id, max(version_no) as max_version_no from questions where bank_id = #{bankId} and deleted = false group by version_group_id ) latest on latest.version_group_id = q.version_group_id and latest.max_version_no = q.version_no where q.bank_id = #{bankId} and q.deleted = false order by q.question_id desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update questions set bank_id = #{bankId}, chapter_name = #{chapterName}, template_code = #{templateCode}, version_group_id = #{versionGroupId}, version_no = #{versionNo}, version_remark = #{versionRemark}, source_action = #{sourceAction}, source_question_id = #{sourceQuestionId}, source_version_no = #{sourceVersionNo}, title = #{title}, question_type = #{questionType}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, answer_text = #{answerText}, analysis_text = #{analysisText}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where question_id = #{questionId} and deleted = false
mapper.select: select max(version_no) from questions where version_group_id = #{versionGroupId} and deleted = false
